# VELARO — Generative Engine Optimization Map

> VELARO is a clothing brand with a strong visual identity, focused on showcasing apparel including shirts, pants, and covers. The brand aims for a beautiful and original aesthetic, suggesting a desire for a distinctive, creative, and visually striking presence that sets it apart from conventional fashion brands.

---

## Pages

### Home
https://velaro-3401c5f3.zappy5.app
Step into VELARO&#39;s fashion boutique online and redefine your style with original shirts, pants, and covers. Explore striking designs that command attention. Shop the look now.

### Collections
https://velaro-3401c5f3.zappy5.app/collections
Unveil our latest collections, from the iconic rock black shirt to bold pants and covers. Grab the best clothing Black Friday deals before they vanish. Curate your wardrobe today.

### About
https://velaro-3401c5f3.zappy5.app/about
VELARO fuses a strong visual identity with creative passion. Learn how we craft apparel that breaks the mold, from standout shirts to signature covers. Join our vision.

### Contact
https://velaro-3401c5f3.zappy5.app/contact
Have a question or need style advice? Reach out to VELARO and experience a fashion boutique online that puts you first. Let&#39;s start a conversation about your next iconic look.

## How to Contact Us

- (No contact details configured yet.)

### Contact form
- URL: https://velaro-3401c5f3.zappy5.app/contact
- Endpoint: https://velaro-3401c5f3.zappy5.app/api/email/contact-form
- Method: POST
- Content-Type: application/json
- Fields:
  - `name` (text, required)
  - `email` (email, required)
  - `phone` (tel)
  - `message` (textarea, required)
  - `privacy_consent` (checkbox, required)

# Business Context (for LLM understanding)

## About VELARO
VELARO is a clothing brand with a strong visual identity, focused on showcasing apparel including shirts, pants, and covers. The brand aims for a beautiful and original aesthetic, suggesting a desire for a distinctive, creative, and visually striking presence that sets it apart from conventional fashion brands.

## Target Audience
- Urban Fashionistas
- Eco-Conscious Shoppers
- Casual Professionals

## Industry
Fashion & Apparel
